upstream.otherDeltaDisposition: agentic-loop, rule-engine, and advertised-tool changes require a no-consumer audit

requiredGates: module, tag, and conformance commit align exactly to beta.149
focused upstream issue-549 lifecycle tests pass
Go unit, race, integration, vet, integration-vet, and build gates pass
normal SIGTERM exits zero without forced kill or false shutdown error signatures
graph-index reaches the captured target and no-write replay probes remain equivalent
fresh external ETS reports exactly 137 passed, 0 failed, 0 skipped
ETS, fixtures, OpenAPI, claims, and skip/filter behavior are not weakened
architect, product-owner, and operator explicitly authorize production

attestationScope.policy: Only immutable architecture contract inputs are signed. Mutable execution and evidence state is excluded so normal workflow progress cannot stale the architect attestation.
attestationScope.bundleHashAlgorithm: SHA-256 of the ordered shasum -a 256 output for immutableContractFiles, using the listed repository-relative paths

mutableWorkflowState.classification: mutable execution, review, operator, and documentation evidence
